title: High Five
description:

and applies 2 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold]

upgraded_description:
[gold]Osty[/gold] deals 13 damage
and applies 3 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold]
to ALL enemies.
notes: Can only be played when Osty is present. Glows red when Osty is missing.
